senses.zh: 電影院 (= movie theater 美式)
senses.example: We went to the cinema to watch Star Wars.
senses.example_zh: 我們去電影院看《星際大戰》。

senses.zh: 電影 (= the movies 美式)
senses.example: Avatar is a significant landmark in Hollywood cinema.
senses.example_zh: 《阿凡達》是好萊塢電影的重要標竿。

senses.example: Have you seen any good films recently?
senses.example_zh: 你最近看了什麼好電影嗎？

senses.example: We will be filming in Australia for a month.
senses.example_zh: 我們會在澳洲拍攝一個月。

senses.example: About half a million people live in Nantou County.
senses.example_zh: 南投縣有五十萬居民。

senses.example: A compound is made up of two or more elements.
senses.example_zh: 化合物是由兩個或以上的元素組成的。

senses.example: Let's list the elements that make up a perfect dinner party
senses.example_zh: 我們來列出舉辦一場完美晚宴的要素吧！

senses.example: The mayor urged citizens to begin preparing for the typhoon.
senses.example_zh: 市長督促市民們開始做防颱準備。

senses.example: He got a green card by marrying a U.S. citizen.
senses.example_zh: 他與美國公民結婚而取得綠卡。

senses.example: A huge chandelier hung from the center of the ceiling.
senses.example_zh: 天花板中央懸掛著一個大吊燈。

senses.example: I hung a poster on the wall.
senses.example_zh: 我在牆上掛了一幅海報。

senses.example: I said goodbye to Sarah on the phone and hung up.
senses.example_zh: 我和莎拉在電話中說再見後就掛斷電話。

senses.example: The murderer hanged himself in his cell.
senses.example_zh: 那名凶手在牢房裡上吊自殺了。

senses.example: The hanger is too small for this coat.
senses.example_zh: 這個衣架對這件大衣來說太小了。

senses.example: Tom is helping the police look for the murder weapon.
senses.example_zh: 湯姆幫助警方找尋凶器。

senses.example: They organized a meeting between teachers and students.
senses.example_zh: 他們組織一個老師與學生之間的會議。

senses.example: Your composition is well-organized.
senses.example_zh: 你的作文很有條理。

senses.example: The essay lacks organization.
senses.example_zh: 這篇文章缺乏組織。

senses.example: The Red Cross is an international organization.
senses.example_zh: 紅十字會是一個國際性的機構。

senses.example: The university presented an honorary doctorate to him.
senses.example_zh: 他獲頒這所大學的榮譽博士學位。

senses.example: The case presents some facts that need further investigation.
senses.example_zh: 這個案例顯現一些需要深入研究的現象。

senses.example: I'm going to present my paper at the conference.
senses.example_zh: 我將在研討會上發表論文。

senses.example: Were you present at the meeting?
senses.example_zh: 你有出席會議嗎？

senses.example: What is your present job?
senses.example_zh: 你目前的工作是什麼？

senses.example: He gave me a dog as a present.
senses.example_zh: 他送我一隻狗當禮物。

senses.example: We should live in the present.
senses.example_zh: 我們應活在當下。

senses.example: At present I live in Hsinchu.
senses.example_zh: 我目前住在新竹。

senses.example: He is not aware of my presence.
senses.example_zh: 他沒有察覺我的存在。

senses.example: The little boy is shy in the presence of strangers.
senses.example_zh: 這個小男孩在陌生人面前會害羞。

senses.example: It is unusual to have a goalkeeper as (the) captain of a soccer team.
senses.example_zh: 守門員擔任足球隊隊長很少見。

senses.example: The captain ordered the crew to abandon the ship.
senses.example_zh: 船長下令船員棄船。

senses.example: He was promoted to captain from lieutenant.
senses.example_zh: 他從中尉受到拔擢成為上尉。

senses.example: She has shown a talent for music since she was young.
senses.example_zh: 她從小就嶄露音樂天分。

senses.example: Mozart is a talented musician.
senses.example_zh: 莫札特是個很有天分的音樂家。

senses.example: Rachel sampled the wine. It was sour.
senses.example_zh: 瑞秋試了一口酒，它是酸的。

senses.example: Sour is an unpleasant taste for me, but my sister has a preference for it.
senses.example_zh: 我不喜歡酸味，但我妹妹喜歡。

senses.example: If not preserved well, foods sour easily.
senses.example_zh: 食物沒妥善保存容易變質。

senses.example: Good medicine tastes bitter.
senses.example_zh: 良藥苦口。

senses.example: I have a bitter memory about my childhood.
senses.example_zh: 我有一段悲苦的童年回憶。

senses.example: Because of the bitterness, we don't like to eat this vegetable.
senses.example_zh: 我們不愛吃這種蔬菜是因為它的苦味。

senses.example: He was full of bitterness after losing his job.
senses.example_zh: 他失業後內心充滿苦悶。

senses.example: I don't like to eat out, because the food is always too salty.
senses.example_zh: 我不喜歡外食，因為食物都太鹹了。

senses.example: Bind the pile of newspapers with string.
senses.example_zh: 用繩子把這疊報紙綁好。

senses.example: I hate to be bound to marriage.
senses.example_zh: 我討厭受婚姻束縛。

senses.example: The city of Hiroshima was destroyed by an atomic bomb in 1945.
senses.example_zh: 廣島在一九四五年遭到原子彈摧毀。

senses.example: This is one of the few cities that were not bombed in WWII.
senses.example_zh: 這是二次大戰中少數沒被轟炸的城市之一。

senses.example: The enemy forces bombarded several of our towns.
senses.example_zh: 敵軍轟炸了我們好幾個城鎮。

senses.example: Many people enjoy jazz music.
senses.example_zh: 許多人喜歡爵士樂。

senses.example: I have made up my mind to be a scientist.
senses.example_zh: 我立志成為一名科學家。

senses.example: This theory has no scientific basis at all.
senses.example_zh: 這個理論完全沒有科學根據。

senses.example: He frightened me when he drove at the speed of 150 km/hr.
senses.example_zh: 他開車時速高達一百五十公里，嚇壞我了。

senses.example: I got such a fright when I heard the shots.
senses.example_zh: 我聽到那幾聲槍響嚇了一大跳。

senses.example: It is not unusual to have stage fright when speaking before a group.
senses.example_zh: 在一群人面前說話怯場是很尋常的事。

senses.example: Water freezes to ice under the temperature of 0°C.
senses.example_zh: 水在零度以下會結冰。

senses.example: I am freezing to death.
senses.example_zh: 我快要冷死了。

senses.example: “Freeze, or I will shoot,” shouted the bank robber.
senses.example_zh: 銀行搶匪大喊「不准動，否則我就開槍。」

senses.example: Our company has put a freeze on raises for years.
senses.example_zh: 我們公司的薪資已經凍漲好幾年了。

senses.example: There are some people skating on the frozen river.
senses.example_zh: 有些人在結凍的河面溜冰。

senses.example: Karen took some ice cubes from the freezer and put them in the soda.
senses.example_zh: 凱倫從冰箱冷凍庫裡拿出一點冰塊，放入汽水中。

senses.example: I was hired as a sailor on a merchant ship.
senses.example_zh: 我受僱於一艘商船上擔任水手。

senses.example: How much does it cost to hire a car for one day in the United States?
senses.example_zh: 在美國租車一天需要多少錢？

senses.example: We need to make some new hires.
senses.example_zh: 我們必須增聘一些人。

senses.example: There are bicycles for hire nearby.
senses.example_zh: 附近有腳踏車提供出租。

senses.example: The boss told me that I was fired.
senses.example_zh: 老闆告訴我，我被開除了。

senses.example: Smoking is banned in all aircraft.
senses.example_zh: 所有的飛機都禁菸。

senses.example: China Airlines has direct flights to Vietnam.
senses.example_zh: 中華航空有直飛越南的班機。

senses.example: If we can't reach an agreement, then we have to decide by vote.
senses.example_zh: 若我們不能達成協議，那只好投票表決。

senses.example: Only one percent of the vote is invalid.
senses.example_zh: 這些選票中只有百分之一是無效票。

senses.example: Will people vote for or against independence?
senses.example_zh: 人們對於獨立會投支持還是反對票？

senses.example: Bee balm can grow in poor soil.
senses.example_zh: 蜂香薄荷能在土壤貧瘠的環境生長。

senses.example: Six people have called to confirm that they will attend the meeting.
senses.example_zh: 有六個人致電確認他們將參加會議。

senses.example: He denied all the accusations.
senses.example_zh: 他否認所有的指控。

senses.zh: deny V-ing / that 子句 (否認做了~)
senses.example: He denied being involved in the case. = He denied that he was involved in the case.
senses.example_zh: 他否認涉案。

senses.example: He denied the students a chance (to speak).
senses.example_zh: 他拒絕讓學生有發言的機會。

senses.example: It is undeniably the best bakery in town.
senses.example_zh: 它無疑是城裡最棒的麵包店。

senses.example: She is a young but talented painter.
senses.example_zh: 她是位年輕但有才華的畫家。

senses.example: My father worked as a painter for twenty years.
senses.example_zh: 我父親從事油漆匠的工作長達二十年。

senses.example: A cat was walking on top of the fence briskly.
senses.example_zh: 一隻貓輕快地走在籬笆上。

senses.example: They have fenced the pond with barbed wire.
senses.example_zh: 他們用有刺鐵絲將池塘圍住。

senses.example: My scooter was stolen.
senses.example_zh: 我的機車被偷了。

senses.example: The thief took all the cash in the safe.
senses.example_zh: 小偷拿走保險箱裡所有的現金。

senses.example: We elected him (as) class leader.
senses.example_zh: 我們選他當班長。

senses.zh: 補充 N(官職)-elect (N當選人(尚未就任))
senses.example: The president-elect is busy appointing positions of his administration.
senses.example_zh: 總統當選人正忙著安排政務官。

senses.example: Local government elections will take place in May.
senses.example_zh: 地方政府選舉將於五月舉行。

senses.example: Our company is located in downtown Taipei.
senses.example_zh: 我們公司位於臺北市中心。

senses.example: I went downtown to buy an evening dress.
senses.example_zh: 我到市中心去買一件晚禮服。

senses.example: My friends and I went to the downtown of London.
senses.example_zh: 我跟朋友們去倫敦的市中心。

senses.example: All the passengers have to buy a ticket before getting on the train.
senses.example_zh: 所有乘客在上火車前都必須購票。

senses.example: She won't mind your being late. Besides, it's hardly your fault.
senses.example_zh: 她不會介意你遲到而且這也不算你的錯。

senses.example: Do you play any other sports besides basketball?
senses.example_zh: 你除了籃球之外還會其他的運動嗎？

senses.example: He sent me an invitation to his concert.
senses.example_zh: 他寄給我一張他的演奏會邀請函。

senses.example: I filled the tank before getting on the highway.
senses.example_zh: 我在上高速公路之前把油箱加滿。

senses.example: She has never seen a tank close up.
senses.example_zh: 她從來沒有近距離看過坦克車。

senses.example: We must produce more food by ourselves and import less.
senses.example_zh: 我們必須生產更多食物並減少進口。

senses.example: The chef buys fresh produce at the market every morning.
senses.example_zh: 這位大廚每天早晨到市場買新鮮的農產品。

senses.example: France is a major wine producer.
senses.example_zh: 法國是主要的葡萄酒生產國。

senses.example: The producer of Hulk is very proud of this movie.
senses.example_zh: 《綠巨人浩克》的製片人很以這部電影為榮。

senses.example: Our products are exported to all over the world.
senses.example_zh: 我們的產品外銷到全世界。

senses.example: We need to improve our production efficiency.
senses.example_zh: 我們需要改善生產效能。

senses.example: The main crops of Taiwan are rice and tea.
senses.example_zh: 臺灣的主要作物是稻米與茶葉。

senses.example: We had a good crop of rice.
senses.example_zh: 我們的稻米大豐收。

senses.example: She cropped her hair short.
senses.example_zh: 她把頭髮剪短了。

senses.example: He was arrested at once after the police found drugs in his car.
senses.example_zh: 警方在他車上發現毒品後，立刻逮捕他。

senses.example: The police made several arrests in the riot.
senses.example_zh: 警方在這場暴動中逮捕數人。

senses.example: The suspect is now under arrest.
senses.example_zh: 嫌犯已遭逮捕。

senses.zh: 察覺、發現（不容易發現的事物）
senses.example: Women are better at detecting subtle emotional changes.
senses.example_zh: 女性較擅長察覺微妙的情緒變化。

senses.zh: 探測、偵測（須使用特殊設備）
senses.example: Another black hole was detected by scientists last month.
senses.example_zh: 科學家上個月又偵測到一個黑洞。

senses.example: Smoke detectors and metal detectors are very useful devices.
senses.example_zh: 煙霧偵測器及金屬探測器是很好用的裝置。

senses.example: The detection of cancer at the early stage is very important.
senses.example_zh: 癌症早期發現是非常重要的。

senses.example: We are not lovers; we are just friends.
senses.example_zh: 我們不是戀人只是朋友。

senses.example: Camping gear makes a great gift for nature lovers.
senses.example_zh: 露營用具對熱愛大自然的人而言是很棒的禮物。

senses.example: Tiger Woods is a famous professional golf player.
senses.example_zh: 老虎・伍茲是鼎鼎有名的職業高爾夫球手。

senses.example: Let's go golfing this weekend.
senses.example_zh: 這週末去打高爾夫吧。

senses.example: Do you want to go bowling with us on Friday?
senses.example_zh: 你禮拜五要和我們一起去打保齡球嗎？

senses.example: Many jets of water aimed at the burning house.
senses.example_zh: 大量水柱噴向失火的房子。

senses.example: I am leaving on a jet (plane).
senses.example_zh: 我要搭噴射機離開。

senses.example: In the water therapy, the water jetted on his back helping him relax.
senses.example_zh: 水療時，水柱射在他的背上幫助放鬆。

senses.example: Henry is a fighter of life—he never gives up.
senses.example_zh: 亨利是位生命的鬥士，他從不放棄。

senses.example: He was shot down by an enemy's fighter.
senses.example_zh: 他被敵軍的戰鬥機射下來。

senses.example: I saw a young woman sunbathing naked on the beach.
senses.example_zh: 我看到一名年輕女子裸體躺在沙灘上做日光浴。

senses.example: Viruses are too small to see with the naked eye.
senses.example_zh: 病毒太小肉眼無法看見。

senses.example: The house is made of brick, not wood.
senses.example_zh: 這棟房子是磚造的不是木造。

senses.example: The base of the pillar is decorated with the images of bats.
senses.example_zh: 柱子底部飾以蝙蝠的圖案。

senses.example: I scraped my knee and it is bleeding.
senses.example_zh: 我膝蓋擦傷正在流血。

senses.example: His ex-wife intends to bleed him for every cent he has.
senses.example_zh: 他的前妻打算榨乾他的每一分錢。

senses.example: Endless civil war has bled the country dry.
senses.example_zh: 無止盡的內戰導致該國財困潦倒。

senses.example: His clothes were torn and bloody.
senses.example_zh: 他的衣服破了，而且見血。

senses.example: Normandy was a bloody battle.
senses.example_zh: 諾曼地是一場傷亡慘重的戰役。

senses.example: The invention of steam engines is a milestone in human history.
senses.example_zh: 蒸汽機的發明是人類史上的一個里程碑。

senses.example: The lake seems to be steaming in the scorching sun.
senses.example_zh: 湖面在強烈的日照下彷彿散發著蒸氣。

senses.example: I steamed some buns.
senses.example_zh: 我蒸了一些饅頭。

senses.example: A small stream runs in front of our garden.
senses.example_zh: 我們的花園前面有一條小河。

senses.example: Tears streamed down from his mother's eyes.
senses.example_zh: 眼淚從他母親的雙眼流下。

senses.example: Streaming music is the most popular way of listening to music.
senses.example_zh: 串流音樂是最流行的聽音樂方式。

senses.example: We use pumps to pump out water.
senses.example_zh: 我們用抽水機抽水。

senses.example: The residents are still pumping floodwater out of the basement.
senses.example_zh: 住戶仍在用抽水機抽出地下室裡的洪水。

senses.example: We’ll have to take the elevator to the 43rd floor.
senses.example_zh: 我們必須搭電梯到四十三樓。

senses.example: The desk is 1.2 meters in length.
senses.example_zh: 這張書桌長一點二米。

senses.example: Can you measure the height of the wall?
senses.example_zh: 你可以量一下牆的高度嗎？

senses.example: The table is one meter in width.
senses.example_zh: 這張桌子寬一公尺。

senses.example: He reads a lot, eager to widen his knowledge.
senses.example_zh: 他大量閱讀，急欲增廣知識。

senses.example: Due to heavy traffic, they plan to widen the road.
senses.example_zh: 因為交通繁忙，他們計畫拓寬道路。

senses.example: There is a clock on the church tower.
senses.example_zh: 教堂的高塔上有一座鐘。

senses.example: Mountains tower in back of my house.
senses.example_zh: 我家後方群山聳立。

senses.example: The Twin Towers used to tower over New York.
senses.example_zh: 雙子星大樓曾高聳於紐約。

senses.example: The Channel Tunnel connects England and France.
senses.example_zh: 英吉利海峽隧道連接英國與法國。

senses.example: Should we tunnel under the channel or build a bridge across it?
senses.example_zh: 我們該挖掘海底隧道還是建造跨海橋梁?

senses.example: Every aircraft must wait until the air traffic controller gives permission for it to take off.
senses.example_zh: 每架飛機都須等待飛航管制員許可後才能起飛。

senses.example: Museums are equipped with temperature and humidity controllers.
senses.example_zh: 博物館裝有溫、濕度調節器。

senses.example: She held the note carefully between the index finger and the thumb.
senses.example_zh: 她小心地用食指與拇指捏著那張紙。

senses.example: She thumbed through the book.
senses.example_zh: 她用拇指翻閱那本書。

senses.zh: 翹起大拇指向路過的汽車要求搭便車
senses.example: My car broke down, so I had to thumb a ride.
senses.example_zh: 我的車子拋錨了，所以我只好搭便車了。

senses.example: Dad gave me a thumbs up after I performed.
senses.example_zh: 父親在我表演完後豎起大拇指表示讚許。

senses.example: When it comes to cooking, I am all thumbs.
senses.example_zh: 說到烹飪，我實在很笨拙。

senses.example: There are twenty-six letters in the English alphabet.
senses.example_zh: 英文共有二十六個字母。

senses.example: The names are listed in alphabetical order.
senses.example_zh: 這些名字按字母順序排序。

senses.example: Ann hit Tommy on the head with a bamboo stick.
senses.example_zh: 安用竹棍打湯米的頭。

senses.example: Why not using underground cables instead of overhead wires?
senses.example_zh: 為什麼不用地下電纜取代高價電線呢?

senses.example: The suspension bridge is hung by cables fixed to towers.
senses.example_zh: 吊橋由固定在塔上的鋼纜懸吊。

senses.example: I live in an apartment with cable TV.
senses.example_zh: 我住在一間裝有有線電視的公寓。

senses.example: We went up the mountain by cable car.
senses.example_zh: 我們搭乘纜車上山。

senses.example: Many remote villages have not been cabled yet.
senses.example_zh: 許多偏遠村莊尚未批設電纜。

senses.example: I had a bad cough last night.
senses.example_zh: 昨晚我咳得很厲害。

senses.example: The smoke made me cough.
senses.example_zh: 煙使我咳嗽。

senses.example: A little way off, I could see cranes flying.
senses.example_zh: 我可以看到不遠處有鶴在飛。

senses.example: The crane lifted the container off the ship.
senses.example_zh: 起重機從船上吊起貨櫃。

senses.example: Everyone craned forward to see what was happening.
senses.example_zh: 大家都向前伸長脖子看發生甚麼事。

senses.example: It’s possible to store a lot more data on a hard disk.
senses.example_zh: 硬碟可以儲存更多資料。

senses.example: We store all the information of our customers in the database.
senses.example_zh: 我們將所有顧客資訊存於電腦資料庫裡。

senses.example: The salad was so delicious that I asked the chef for the recipe.
senses.example_zh: 那道沙拉如此的美味，我還向主廚要了食譜。

senses.example: The crackers were so tasty that I ate them all myself.
senses.example_zh: 這些餅乾太好吃，我一個人把它們都吃光了。

senses.example: The dinosaur lived a very long time ago but is now extinct.
senses.example_zh: 恐龍早已滅絕。

senses.example: The dragon spits fire at people.
senses.example_zh: 那條龍會噴火。

senses.example: I felt dizzy after riding the roller-coaster.
senses.example_zh: 我坐完雲霄飛車後覺得暈眩。

senses.example: A UFO flew at a dizzy speed in the sky.
senses.example_zh: 幽浮在空中以令人昏眩的速度飛行。

senses.example: Rafael’s donkey was stolen.
senses.example_zh: 拉斐爾的驢子被偷了。

senses.example: The sheik is riding on a camel.
senses.example_zh: 酋長正騎著駱駝。

senses.example: I object to testing new drugs on animals.
senses.example_zh: 我反對利用動物試驗新藥。

senses.example: Taking drugs is illegal and harmful.
senses.example_zh: 吸毒是違法且有害的。

senses.example: The patient had to be heavily drugged to ease his pain.
senses.example_zh: 那位病人需要高劑量的麻藥才能止痛。

senses.example: The madman believed people would drug his food and drings.
senses.example_zh: 這個瘋子覺得別人會在他的食物及用水裡下藥。

senses.example: He was in charge of the drugstore.
senses.example_zh: 他負責管理這家藥妝店。

senses.example: He's been deaf and dumb since birth.
senses.example_zh: 他天生就又聾又啞。

senses.example: Are they brave or just dumb?
senses.example_zh: 他們算勇敢還是愚蠢？

senses.example: He’s been totally deaf since birth.
senses.example_zh: 他一出生就全聾。

entries.word: turn a deaf ear to N

senses.example: He turns a deaf ear to his parents' advice.
senses.example_zh: 他對父母的勸告置之不理。

senses.example: To make coffee, first you have to grind coffee beans into powder.
senses.example_zh: 煮咖啡前必須先將咖啡豆磨成粉。

senses.example: When I walked in, she was powdering her face.
senses.example_zh: 我進去時，她正往臉上撲粉。

senses.example: Flour is the main ingredient in a cake.
senses.example_zh: 麵粉是蛋糕的主要成分。

senses.example: She got very high marks in geography exam.
senses.example_zh: 她在地理考試中得到非常高的分數。

senses.example: I need some boards, a hammer and some nails.
senses.example_zh: 我需要幾塊木板、一支鐵鎚和一些釘子。

senses.example: Be careful not to break your nails.
senses.example_zh: 小心別把指甲弄斷了。

senses.example: She nailed a mailbox on the door.
senses.example_zh: 她在門上釘了一個信箱。

senses.example: She took a hammer and knocked a hole in the wall.
senses.example_zh: 她拿著鐵鎚在牆上敲了一個洞。

senses.example: They hammered the nails into the wooden walls.
senses.example_zh: 他們把釘子敲進木牆裡。

senses.zh: 強迫灌輸、嘮叨不停 (~sth. into sb. / sth.)
senses.example: He tries to hammer the anti-drug message into his son.
senses.example_zh: 他試著將反毒訊息灌輸給兒子。

senses.example: She took out her handkerchief and blew her nose loudly.
senses.example_zh: 她拿出手帕並大聲擤鼻涕。

senses.example: He cut the honeydew melon into twelve slices.
senses.example_zh: 他把哈密瓜切成十二片。

senses.example: Watermelons are juicy.
senses.example_zh: 西瓜是很多汁的。

senses.example: I was bitten by mosquitoes.
senses.example_zh: 我被蚊子咬。

senses.example: Moths are not so beautiful as butterflies.
senses.example_zh: 蛾不像蝴蝶那樣漂亮。

senses.example: You should put the napkin on your lap.
senses.example_zh: 應將餐巾放在大腿上。

senses.example: Many gas stations give customers boxes of tissues for free.
senses.example_zh: 許多加油站免費贈送顧客盒裝面紙。

senses.example: Smoking can severely damage your lung tissue.
senses.example_zh: 吸煙會嚴重破壞肺部組織。

senses.example: Could you pass me the pair of scissors?
senses.example_zh: 可以把剪刀遞給我嗎？

senses.example: The first semester starts on the 29th of August.
senses.example_zh: 第一學期於八月二十九日開始。

senses.example: The T-shirts are made of 100% cotton.
senses.example_zh: 這些T恤是百分百純棉。

senses.example: The dress is made of silk.
senses.example_zh: 這件洋裝是絲製的。

senses.example: The blankets are made of wool.
senses.example_zh: 這些毯子為羊毛製。

senses.example: They produce woolen products.
senses.example_zh: 他們生產羊毛製品。

senses.example: My mother is very skilled in cooking.
senses.example_zh: 我媽媽很擅長烹飪。

senses.example: He is a skillful and experienced negotiator.
senses.example_zh: 他是位極富經驗的談判專家。

senses.example: Several squirrels make this pine tree home.
senses.example_zh: 好幾隻松鼠以這棵松樹為家。

senses.example: If you subtract 30 from 45, you get 15.
It’s easy to spot flocks of geese as they migrate.
senses.example_zh: 當成群的野雁遷徙時，十分醒目。

senses.example: Two white swans were swimming in the lake.
senses.example_zh: 兩隻白天鵝在湖裡游泳。

senses.example: They are so talkative that others don't have the chance to speak.
senses.example_zh: 他們話多到其他人沒機會開口。

senses.example: Tangerines are easier to peel than oranges.
senses.example_zh: 橘子的皮比柳橙更容易剝。

senses.example: The Korean drama I watched last week was terrific!
senses.example_zh: 我上週看的韓劇棒極了。

senses.example: You just need to change your underwear.
senses.example_zh: 你只需要更換內衣。

senses.example: He is wearing shorts, not underpants.
senses.example_zh: 他穿的是短褲，不是內褲。

senses.example: Ambulances are used for the transport of patients.
senses.example_zh: 救護車是用來運送病人的。

senses.example: The company transports meat in refrigerated containers.
senses.example_zh: 這家公司用冷凍貨櫃運送肉品。

senses.example: I don't know how to overcome my horror of cockroaches.
senses.example_zh: 我不知道如何克服對蟑螂的恐懼。

senses.zh: 令人害怕或戰慄的人或事
senses.example: Cockroaches are a horror to my sister.
senses.example_zh: 蟑螂是我妹妹很怕的東西。

senses.example: Seeing the sight, he drew back in horror.
senses.example_zh: 看到這個景象就害怕地往後退。

senses.example: A lot of girls scream when watching the horror film.
senses.example_zh: 許多女孩子看恐怖片時會尖叫。

senses.example: Her parents were killed in a horrible accident.
senses.example_zh: 她的父母死於一場可怕的意外。

senses.example: The food looked horrible, but it tasted OK.
senses.example_zh: 這個食物看起來很糟，但嚐起來還不錯。

senses.example: The designer's monthly salary is around fifty thousand dollars.
senses.example_zh: 這位設計師的月薪大約五萬元。

senses.example: He gets a good wage.
senses.example_zh: 他的薪資優渥。

senses.example: The police are waging war on drug dealers.
senses.example_zh: 警察向毒販開戰。

senses.example: Vitamin C is important for healthy gums.
senses.example_zh: 維他命C對牙齦健康很重要。

senses.example: Many people don't like to chew gum.
senses.example_zh: 很多人不喜歡吃口香糖。

senses.example: From her grin, I guess she knows something I don't know.
senses.example_zh: 我從她的笑容猜想，她知道一些我不知道的事。

senses.example: Learning about our victory, our coach grinned from ear to ear.
senses.example_zh: 教練得知我們贏得勝利笑得合不攏嘴。

senses.example: He gave me a pile of books to read during the summer vacation.
senses.example_zh: 他給我一堆書要我暑假時研讀。

senses.example: The desk was piled high with books.
senses.example_zh: 桌上堆著高高的書。

senses.example: When my work piles up, my anxiety increases.
senses.example_zh: 當我的工作愈積愈多時，焦慮就會增加。

senses.example: The heap of stones is where the building used to be.
senses.example_zh: 這堆石頭就是這棟建築物曾經的所在地。

senses.example: Books are scattered in heaps on the floor.
senses.example_zh: 書籍一堆一堆地散落在地上。

senses.example: We have to rake the leaves and heap them on the compost pile.
senses.example_zh: 我們必須把葉子耙起來堆在堆肥上。

senses.example: The penalty for speeding in school zones will increase.
senses.example_zh: 在學區超速的罰金將提高。

senses.example: Is this district zoned for residential or commercial use?
senses.example_zh: 這個區域是被劃分為住宅區還是商業區？

senses.example: Taipei and Tokyo lie in different time zones.
senses.example_zh: 臺北和東京位於不同時區。

senses.example: In the past, wealthy families loved to use ivory chopsticks.
senses.example_zh: 早期有錢人家喜歡使用象牙筷子。

senses.example: May chose an ivory wedding dress instead of a pure white one.
senses.example_zh: 梅選擇象牙白的婚紗而非純白的。

senses.example: Sometimes scholars should step out of their ivory tower and take a good look at the real world.
senses.example_zh: 有時學者應走出象牙塔，好好觀察真實的世界。

senses.example: People long for wealth and fame.
senses.example_zh: 人們渴求名利。

senses.example: He comes from a wealthy family.
senses.example_zh: 他出身富裕。

senses.example: Without health, riches are meaningless.
senses.example_zh: 沒有了健康，財富就失去意義。

senses.example: Sometimes, Paul can be as stubborn as a mule.
senses.example_zh: 保羅有時就和騾子一樣頑固。

senses.example: Can the government rid our homeland of terrorist threats?
senses.example_zh: 政府能使我們的家園免受恐怖分子威脅嗎？

senses.example: It's time to get rid of all these old toys.
senses.example_zh: 是時候把這些舊玩具丟掉了。

senses.example: He struck the robber with a mighty blow.
senses.example_zh: 他給了搶匪猛烈的一擊。

senses.example: Eric was tugging at the rope with all his might.
senses.example_zh: 艾瑞克用盡全力拉繩子。

senses.example: David amazed his friends by suddenly getting married.
senses.example_zh: 大衛的閃婚讓朋友們嚇了一跳。

senses.example: We were all amazed at her sudden change; it is definitely amazing.
senses.example_zh: 我們對她突然的轉變感到吃驚，實在令人驚訝。

senses.example: After I told him my adventure, he looked at me in amazement.
senses.example_zh: 我向他述說我的冒險後，他吃驚地看著我。

senses.example: To my amazement, my best friend refused to help me.
senses.example_zh: 令我吃驚的是我最好的朋友竟然拒絕幫我。

senses.example: It was so humid that my cotton shirt would not dry even a little.
senses.example_zh: 天氣太潮濕，我的棉襯衫完全沒有乾。

senses.example: Her eyes were moist with tears.
senses.example_zh: 她熱淚盈眶。

senses.example: Too much moisture in the air can cause the growth of mold.
senses.example_zh: 空氣中的溼氣太重就會長黴。

senses.example: The chill of the wind makes me shiver.
senses.example_zh: 寒風令我發抖。

senses.example: Put the coke in the refrigerator to chill it.
senses.example_zh: 把可樂放在冰箱裡冷藏。

senses.example: It was so chilly this morning.
senses.example_zh: 今天早上好冷啊！

senses.example: The writer got a chilly welcome at the university.
senses.example_zh: 這位作家在這所大學受到漠視。

senses.example: He was upset and needed our comfort.
senses.example_zh: 他心情不好，需要我們的安慰。

senses.example: The nurse is good at comforting those in great anxiety.
senses.example_zh: 這位護士擅長安撫極度焦躁不安的人。

senses.example: The news was comforting.
senses.example_zh: 這個消息令人欣慰。

senses.example: Students make a dash for the cafeteria as soon as the bell rang.
senses.example_zh: 鐘聲一響，學生們都衝往自助餐廳。

senses.example: He holds the record for the 100-meter dash.
senses.example_zh: 他是一百公尺短跑紀錄的保持人。

senses.example: We usually expect an explanation after a dash.
senses.example_zh: 通常在破折號之後會有一個解釋。

senses.example: The horse dashed madly into the bush.
senses.example_zh: 那匹馬發狂似地衝進樹叢。

senses.example: In our apartment building, only a few apartments are still vacant.
senses.example_zh: 我們居住的公寓大樓只有幾戶還空著。

senses.example: The sum of my monthly expenses is about ten thousand NT dollars.
senses.example_zh: 我每個月的支出總額約新臺幣一萬元。

senses.example: The sum of 13 and 8 is 21.
senses.example_zh: 13和8的總和是21。

senses.example: I am summing up all the figures to see how much I have spent.
senses.example_zh: 我正在加總所有花費金額。

senses.example: Jimmy will open the debate and I will sum up.
senses.example_zh: 吉米為辯論賽開場而我做總結。

senses.example: To sum up, the police should crack down on drunk driving.
senses.example_zh: 總之，警方應嚴加取締酒駕。

senses.example: Why do judges wear black robes?
senses.example_zh: 為什麼法官要穿黑袍呢？

senses.example: Do you wear a robe after a shower?
senses.example_zh: 你淋浴後會穿浴袍嗎？

senses.zh: （飛機）墜毀、（車輛相撞的）嚴重事故
senses.example: Forty-one people were killed in the plane crash.
senses.example_zh: 四十一個人在這場飛機失事中喪生。

senses.example: The ball flew over, and then we heard the crash of glass.
senses.example_zh: 球飛過來，接著我們聽到玻璃碎裂聲。

senses.example: The plane crashed into a mountain and all the passengers were killed.
senses.example_zh: 飛機墜毀在山裡，乘客全數罹難。

senses.example: The valuable vase crashed into pieces in the earthquake.
senses.example_zh: 這個貴重地花瓶在地震中摔成碎片。

senses.example: My computer crashed three times yesterday.
senses.example_zh: 我的電腦昨天當機三次。

senses.example: He fell into the icy river and caught a bad cold.
senses.example_zh: 他跌進冰冷的河裡罹患了重感冒。

senses.example: Her question got an icy response from the chairman.
senses.example_zh: 主席對她的問題給予冷淡的回應。

senses.example: He screwed the board into the wall.
senses.example_zh: 他用螺絲釘將板子固定在牆上。

senses.example: I think I screwed up my interview.
senses.example_zh: 我想我的面試搞砸了。

senses.example: You just need to tighten these two screws here.
senses.example_zh: 你只需要把這兩個螺絲釘鎖緊就行了。

senses.example: They sell pottery and other handmade goods.
senses.example_zh: 他們販售陶器與其他手工製品。

senses.example: The artist formed the clay into a beautiful plate.
senses.example_zh: 這名藝術家將陶土塑造成漂亮的盤子。

senses.example: Oranges are rich in vitamin C.
senses.example_zh: 柳橙富含維他命C。

senses.example: I have an ache in my chest.
senses.example_zh: 我的胸口疼痛。

senses.example: Her head ached badly and her body felt like it had been set on fire.
senses.example_zh: 她頭痛欲裂，身體好像有火在燒。

senses.example: As long as you work hard, your dream will come true someday.
senses.example_zh: 只要努力終有一日夢想會成真。

senses.example: We should meet sometime soon.
senses.example_zh: 我們應該儘快找時間見面。

senses.example: I know this is legal, but somehow it doesn't feel right.
senses.example_zh: 我知道這是合法的，但不知怎麼地總覺得有些不對勁。

senses.example: We will get the money back somehow.
senses.example_zh: 我們總歸是要把錢拿回來的（以某種方式拿回來）。

senses.example: She may not answer me, but I will ask anyhow.
senses.example_zh: 她可能不會回答我，但無論如何我還是要問。

senses.example: The wounds are healing gradually.
senses.example_zh: 傷口逐漸癒合中。

senses.example: Throughout his life he healed thousands of patients.
senses.example_zh: 他一生治癒了成千上萬的病人。

senses.example: The flames grew larger as the wind blew harder.
senses.example_zh: 風吹得愈大，火就燒得愈旺。

senses.example: The candles flame brightly.
senses.example_zh: 燭火燒得明亮。

senses.example: The expedition successfully subdued the tropical jungle.
senses.example_zh: 探險隊成功征服了熱帶叢林。

senses.example: Living in a concrete jungle, we feel nature is so far away.
senses.example_zh: 我們住在水泥叢林裡，感覺離大自然好遙遠。

senses.example: Bricks are used to pave the sidewalks throughout the city.
senses.example_zh: 整個市區的人行道都鋪設地磚。

entries.word: pave the way for / to N

senses.example: The meeting will pave the way for our cooperation.
senses.example_zh: 這次會議將為我們的合作鋪路。

senses.example: It's against the traffic regulations to ride a scooter on the pavement.
senses.example_zh: 在人行道上騎機車是違反交通規則的。

senses.example: Vendors are not allowed on the sidewalks here.
senses.example_zh: 這裡的人行道上禁止攤販設攤。

senses.example: When water freezes and becomes solid, it's called ice.
senses.example_zh: 水結冰變成固體時稱為冰。

senses.example: The company is proud of the solid furniture they make.
senses.example_zh: 這家公司以生產堅固的傢俱為傲。

senses.example: His essay has solid arguments.
senses.example_zh: 他的文章論點紮實。

senses.example: Solids are hard substances, like glass, wood and metal.
senses.example_zh: 固體是硬的物質，像是玻璃、木頭與金屬。

senses.example: You can only feed those kittens liquid food.
senses.example_zh: 你只能餵這些小貓流質食物。

senses.example: Brown liquid is flowing out of the bucket.
senses.example_zh: 褐色的液體從桶子裡流出來。

senses.example: The pen is mightier than the sword.
senses.example_zh: 筆墨勝於刀劍。

senses.example: There is a river at the bottom of the canyon.
senses.example_zh: 峽谷底部有條河流。

senses.example: The Grand Canyon is the deepest canyon on earth.
senses.example_zh: 大峽谷是地上最深的峽谷。

senses.example: He made a graceful dive into the river.
senses.example_zh: 他優雅地跳入河中。

senses.example: We have made several great dives in Bali.
senses.example_zh: 我們在峇里島有過多次美好的潛水體驗。

senses.zh: 跳水【~off / from A into B】
senses.example: He dived from the bridge into the river to save the girl.
senses.example_zh: 他為了救那名女孩，從橋上跳進河裡。

senses.example: The submarine can dive up to 1100 meters.
senses.example_zh: 這艘潛艇可潛深至一千一百公尺。

senses.example: He likes to go surfing in the summer.
senses.example_zh: 他喜歡在夏天去衝浪。

senses.example: Teenagers surf the internet more often than their parents.
senses.example_zh: 青少年比父母更常上網。

senses.example: The cushion is filled with feathers.
senses.example_zh: 這個墊子是以羽毛填充。

senses.example: Many foxes have been killed for their furs.
senses.example_zh: 許多狐狸因毛皮而喪生。

senses.example: Furry slippers are extremely comfortable on such cold days.
senses.example_zh: 毛茸茸的拖鞋在這種寒冷的天氣非常舒適。

senses.example: After drinking a whole bottle of wine, he was dead drunk.
senses.example_zh: 他喝完一整瓶酒後，爛醉如泥。

senses.example: A couple of drunks passed out on the sidewalk.
senses.example_zh: 幾個喝得酩酊大醉的人昏睡在人行道上。

senses.example: Drunk / Drunken driving is very dangerous.
senses.example_zh: 酒駕很危險。

senses.example: Never leave your luggage unattended.
senses.example_zh: 時時注意你的隨身行李。

senses.example: I put my baggage into my closet.
senses.example_zh: 我將行李箱放進衣櫥。

senses.example: I stuffed six big pieces of luggage into the trunk.
senses.example_zh: 我把六件大行李塞進後車廂。

senses.example: The school is noted for its academic excellence.
senses.example_zh: 這所學校以傑出的學術表現聞名。

senses.example: The lion-tamer cracked his whip.
senses.example_zh: 馴獸員大力揮動鞭子。

senses.example: I don't like the way the jockey whips his horse.
senses.example_zh: 我不喜歡這名騎師鞭打馬的方式。

senses.example: He whipped eggs and butter to make a cake.
senses.example_zh: 他將雞蛋和奶油攪拌做成蛋糕。

senses.example: He tried not to let the bad news spoil his party.
senses.example_zh: 他儘量不讓那個壞消息毀了他的派對。

senses.example: Parents spoil their children by doing everything for them.
senses.example_zh: 父母若什麼事都親力親為會寵壞孩子。
